overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in a long robe walking along a misty mountain trail. The character traverses a dirt path bordered by rocky cliffs and wooden fences through a forested valley, eventually reaching and crossing railway tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with rocky cliff face and abandoned supplies

events.description: passing abandoned crates and bags on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain trail, passing abandoned supplies on the left

entered.detail: steep rocky mountainside covered with patches of grass and moss
weathered wooden fence lining the right side of the path
discarded supplies and canvas bags left on the roadside
narrow dirt trail winding through the mountain terrain
tall wooden post with a lantern mounted on top

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow mountain trail bordered by a steep rocky cliff on the left and a wooden fence on the right. The path is damp and overcast, with abandoned crates visible on the roadside. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves through the misty mountain environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with wooden fencing and railway approach

events.description: wooden signpost comes into view on the left side of the path
railway tracks become visible in the distance ahead as the forest opens up

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding forest path, approaching the open area with railway tracks

entered.detail: wooden directional sign mounted on a post beside the trail
thick cluster of pine and deciduous trees surrounding the path
metal railway tracks cutting through the forest valley

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through denser forest vegetation with tall trees surrounding the path. A wooden signpost appears on the left as the character passes deeper into the woods. Toward the end of the segment, railway tracks become visible in the distance as the terrain opens up into a wider valley.

events.description: small animal appears on the left side of the path near the railway tracks
character steps onto and crosses the railway tracks

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the railway tracks, navigating through the forest clearing

notable_agents.action: small creature standing on the path edge near the tracks
distant figure standing near the railway tracks ahead

entered.detail: open grassy area with scattered rocks alongside the railway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wider clearing where railway tracks cut through the forest. A small animal is visible on the left side of the path, and a distant figure stands near the tracks ahead. The character continues forward and steps onto the railway tracks, crossing them as the wooden fence falls behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a damp mountain trail that gradually opens from a narrow cliffside path into a wide forested valley. It begins by trailing a character in a robe along a misty road bordered by a steep rocky cliff and a wooden fence, passing abandoned crates under an overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the path winds deeper into a dense forest of tall trees and passes a wooden signpost before the terrain begins to expand. The scene then opens into a wider clearing where railway tracks emerge in the distance, revealing a small animal and a distant figure ahead. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the wooden fence behind and step across the railway tracks cutting through the woods.
